title: pouteria neriifolia
intro: Pouteria neriifolia, also known as the Cambara or Cambara tree, is a species of plant native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Pouteria neriifolia lie in its bark, which contains high levels of tannins and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, wounds, and skin conditions. Pouteria neriifolia can be prepared into herbal remedies such as tea, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in folk medicine to treat a range of ailments.
